transcript.text:
[The visuals]
[Mouth-watering]
[Can't stop]
[I'm watching you]
[I will show you]
[I lose]
Hello
Menu
This moves!
I've never been to places like this before
It's like the ones in the movies Moving tables
Spin it around
My very first time
I want to fill it up
1 Jjajangmyun (black bean noodles), 1 jjamppong (spicy seafood noodles), 1 stir-fried jjajangmyun
They said the stir-fried one is their signature menu

I wonder what other dishes are good
Excuse me
[Yes?]
What do you recommend?
From the main dishes
What do you like?
Meat or seafood?
I like meat
Then get the tangsuyuk (fried pork)
What else do you recommend?
[Let's see]
Palbochae (stir-fried vegetables and seafood), Yusanseul (stir-fried mushrooms)
Chili shrimp too
Then...
1 Jjajangmyun, 1 jjamppong, 1 stir-fried jjajangmyun
Is it for a party of 3?

You're ordering main dishes too?
Yes
Then just do 1 jjajangmyun, not 2
And maybe 1 jjamppong
I want to try both
You want it all?
[Ordering it again]
1 small tangsuyuk and 1 chili shrimp, please
Shrimp too?
[Yikes]
[Tansuyuk]
[Jjamppong, Jjajangmyun]
[Fried rice]
[Stir-fried jjajangmyun]
[Chili shrimp]
[Ready to go]

Thank you
Cu..cucumbers
Let's take that out
That looks good
You need to come to the right one It's different for sure
Let's start with the basic
It's been a while
Wait, I think I had it recently
Yes, no, maybe?
It tastes like...
You know how sometimes it can get a little bland, this one is different
It brings back memories
The sauce is not too strong
The flavor is definitely in there
It's seasoned just right
It's perfect

You can't possibly go wrong with this
It's.. almost.. all gone.. already?
[We all know why]
It's tasty
The noodles are pretty thin
The vegetables are cut into small pieces
It may look bland, but it's delicious
I usually don't eat the veggies in here
But these are sliced into small pieces, so I can eat it
Next
Tangsuyuk
It's chewy inside
Is it rice flour?
It's chewy as if it is
It's a standard sweet & sour sauce
Not too sour

It's hard to make it delicious without making it salty
It's not salty, but it's perfectly delicious
[I'm eating this after]
Chili shrimp It's huge
I'm going to take the biggest one
Are they usually this big?
The batter is not too thick
The shrimp is huge
It's.. Amazing
When you order this through delivery and take the first bite
You tend to get a lot of batter taste
But this has a lot of shrimp flavor
Jjamppong this time
A little bit of the soup
Stew?
It doesn't taste like the jjamppong that I know

Nevermind, it's jjamppong
I don't know what I was tasting
[White shirt again]
Why do I always do this?
The color is not too red either
It looks a little bland from the looks
The flavors are not too strong It has a kick to it though
Spicy, but not too strong
Is this cucumber?
No way
It's not
It's refreshing
[When ahjussis eat after a night of drink.MP4]
Let's mix this up before the noodles get bloated
Let's take this out for a bit
They said that this is their specialty

The noodles are still okay
It would've been bloated if I had it delivered
The meat is big too
It's huge Look
Wait a minute
Let's take a bite
Let's see which one's better
It's not really fair for this one though
Because I had the regular one first It probably tastes more delicious
Tasty
It's different for sure
This one has a very standard and traditional taste
This one is stir-fried with oil
It's got the greasy flavor, in a good way
It's really different
It's really hard to decide

I needed to put fried egg on top
Wrap it with the egg
Thank you
You didn't even eat it yet
I just started eating
I better finish it all now
Fried rice now
I must eat this too
The jjajang sauce is good
Fried rice is always tasty
Now that I've tried everything now
It's not too special or different
But it tastes very traditional
Very standard
I should be using the spinning table
But there's nothing here, do I put it all on here?

I've always wanted to try it
[Let's just continue eating]
There was like only 1 restaurant like this that delivers
Tansuyuk needs to be chewy
I don't like when it tastes like flour
Tasty chili shrimp
I think this one is the MVP
Today's MVP
The onion's crispiness is what makes this dish good
Although I don't like onions, This isn't bad
It's sweet
The jjajang sauce is flavorful though
[You are now watching Tzuyang eat vegetables]
I'm good at eating vegetables (self-hypnosis)
[It's scary that she's smiling]
[Onions defeated!]

I saw your pork belly mukbang
Oh really? When
Excuse me?
[Saying that the shrimp is good]
This one is really tasty
I rarely scrape everything off the bowls at Chines cuisines
I leave bits and pieces
Now fried rice with jjamppong soup
Incredible
With some jjajang sauce
It's like eating meal #2
Excuse me
Can I have 1 soda?
1 more?
Yes please
Thank you

You ate it all
Do you see this?
I don't taste the flour
This one is amazing
It's good
The flavor is not too strong It's delicious
[Describing how good it is]
I wish this was near my house
I'm even eating the tail
[What are you even scraping?]
Last bite!
Today's MVP
[Trying to say she finished it all]
It was a very delicious meal
